name: Entra Terminated Accounts Still Active
description: Detects terminated employees that still have active access in entra.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.mail AS email, e.termination_date FROM entra_users u JOIN employees e ON LOWER(COALESCE(u.mail, '')) = LOWER(e.work_email) WHERE e.status = 'terminated' AND COALESCE(u.account_enabled, true) = true
remediation: Disable or remove provider access for terminated employees within 24 hours and verify all active sessions are revoked.
